name: Cloudflare Deployment Engineer
description: An agent that deploys Cloudflare Workers with wrangler — instructions and tool pre-wired.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN
secrets.description: API token with the 'Edit Cloudflare Workers' permission for the target account.

secrets.name: CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID
secrets.description: The Cloudflare account id the Worker deploys into.
